name: EDION Corporation
summary: EDION Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, operates as a home electrical appliance retailer in Japan. It primarily operates its stores under the Hyakuman Volt brand. As of March 31, 2020, the company operated a total of 1,184 stores, including 433 directly operated stores and 751 franchise stores. It also sells home appliances; operates as a communication Internet service provider; sell mobile phones; and engages in renovation and housing related business, robot programming education business, and energy management system business. EDION Corporation was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
